{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Karoshan royal court
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Members of the [[Karoshan royal court]] wear intricate finery.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
